description: Canonical registry of every WorldMonitor-derived data subset azimuth may surface. The per-source license guardrail (scripts/check_sources.py) validates every entry before any subset is surfaced as L1. A subset that is not in this registry, or whose entry fails the guardrail, MUST NOT be surfaced. See docs/source-guardrail.md. Each surfaced source carries a `theme` that maps it to one L2 brief (see `themes` below); excluded sources carry a `surfaced_reason` explaining why they stay surfaced:false.

content_class_policy.line: fact-vs-propaganda (Michael 2026-06-24). A channel is surfaceable iff it (1) monitors FACTS — observed events, measurements, positions, records — AND (2) is free-to-use (license-clean). Sensitivity is NEVER a deny reason; only LICENSE or non-factual (opinion/propaganda) content is. A factual record is allowed even on a sensitive topic — a conflict EVENT, a ship POSITION, a flight TRACK, a power outage are observed facts; an OPINION about them is propaganda.
content_class_policy.note: DENIED classes are non-factual content: political propaganda, opinion/advocacy, editorial/communication, political-or-safety POSITION-taking, investment advice. The gate is `factual AND free-to-use license` — a restricted/commercial feed stays out on LICENSE grounds (not editorial). NEWS is allowed as a factual channel (news-factual) — the per-source filter keeps only fact-reporting wire/agency sources and strips op-ed/editorial/advocacy outlets. ALL sensitive-topic factual EVENT classes (conflict-event-record, vessel-position, flight-track, cyber-event, civil-unrest-event) are allowed once the feed license is free. `benchmark_foil_classes` (forecast / intelligence-assessment / scenario) are NOT surfaced as azimuth channels — they are predictions/assessments/hypotheticals, not observed facts; azimuth uses them as BENCHMARK foils (observed+sourced facts vs predicted/assessed opinion) per work-item azi-benchmark-vs-forecast-intelligence-W26. prediction-market raw odds stay allowed (the quoted price is an observed fact) but carry a synthesis caution forbidding investment framing in L2.

prediction-markets.title: Prediction Markets Weekly
prediction-markets.hold_reason: L1 ingest is ACTIVE (channel passes the guardrail). The quoted prediction-market PRICE is an observed fact (allowed under the 2026-06-24 fact-vs-propaganda line). The L2 brief is held for a synthesis-breadth reason only — NOT an editorial deny: the live feed currently surfaces a single market, too narrow to evolve into a balanced weekly brief without that one market dominating. Brief lands once the feed carries a broader market set. Reporting the price is fine; the hold is about brief breadth, not topic sensitivity.

sources.surfaced_reason: HELD ON LICENSE GROUNDS ONLY: a conflict EVENT record is an observed fact (allowed under the 2026-06-24 fact-vs-propaganda line — sensitivity is never a deny reason). It stays surfaced:false purely because the upstream license is unknown (not in the free-to-use allowlist). Surfaceable the moment a clean license is confirmed; no editorial barrier remains.

HELD ON LICENSE GROUNDS ONLY: a vessel POSITION is an observed fact (allowed under the 2026-06-24 fact-vs-propaganda line — sensitivity is never a deny reason). Maritime/AIS would be the 'Maritime' theme; it stays surfaced:false purely because the AIS-aggregator license is unknown (not in the free-to-use allowlist). Surfaceable once a clean license is confirmed; no editorial barrier remains.

HELD ON LICENSE GROUNDS ONLY: a flight TRACK is an observed fact (allowed under the 2026-06-24 fact-vs-propaganda line — sensitivity is never a deny reason). Air-traffic/ADS-B would be the 'Air-traffic' theme; it stays surfaced:false purely because the ADS-B Exchange license is unknown (not in the free-to-use allowlist). Surfaceable once a clean license is confirmed; no editorial barrier remains.
